nasb.text: And if he knocks out a tooth of his male or female slave, he shall let him go free on account of his tooth.

esv.text: If he knocks out the tooth of his slave, male or female, he shall let the slave go free because of his tooth.

cnv.text: 如果有人打落了他奴僕的一顆牙，或婢女的一顆牙，就要因他的牙的緣故讓他自由離去。

ccb.text: 同样，倘若他打掉了仆婢的一颗牙齿，也要因此而释放他。
